headline: Tickets on Sale Today for United's First Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner with Elevated Interior Flights
summary: Starting today, travelers can book seats on United's most premium international aircraft yet – the 787-9 Dreamliner with the United Elevated interior. Unveiled last May, this new aircraft has been redesigned from nose-to-tail with 99 total premium seats – the highest of percentage among U.S. carriers – and marks the introduction of the airline's new United Polaris Studio℠ suites: eight, lie-flat, all-aisle-access seats that are 25% larger than standard United Polaris® seats with privacy doors*,

content.title: Tickets on Sale Today for United's First Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner with Elevated Interior Flights

thumbnail.caption: United begins selling tickets for United Polaris Studio℠ suites.

headline: United Airlines Tests Elevated 787 Suites As Premium Profitability Play
summary: United Airlines Holdings (NasdaqGS:UAL) has begun operating its first international flights using 787-9 Dreamliners equipped with the new United Elevated interior. The upgraded aircraft feature Polaris Studio suites in the premium cabin, with tickets now on sale and initial long haul routes starting service soon. The move marks a material refresh of United's long haul customer offering in the competitive international premium travel market. United Airlines Holdings, the parent of United...
